arts.ttl: ‘Not my problem’ - Aston Villa ace Jhon Duran hits back at critics with attitude claim - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: “It’s work, you have to learn to know how to work, behave like another person on the team, whatever the coach decides and when it’s time to participate. Duran insists he is content at Villa despite starting just three games so far, none of which have come in the Premier League ahead of Saturday's clash with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Man City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side look to bounce back from defeat to move ahead of title rivals Liverpool
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Brighton host Manchester City in Premier League action from the Amex Stadium ahead of the international break.

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo says Liverpool have a player on their books who is just so underrated
arts.sum: Liverpool have a number of seriously underrated players in their squad. Glen Johnson stated last season that Alexis Mac Allister is the most underrated player...

arts.ttl: How you can meet Brian Little as Aston Villa legend explains reasons behind exciting new project
arts.sum: Andy Blair will host the evening, joined by Brian himself, who will share the story behind Little Legends and the inspiration for his autobiographical series, which captures positive messages for children striving to reach their dreams. "About five years ago, at the age of 65, I decided to start writing stories inspired by my life—a schoolboy with big dreams of becoming a footballer," Brian said.
